title.en: 60 GHz and Pencil Beams: Directional Multi-Gigabit DMG (11ad) and EDMG (11ay)
title.zh: 60 GHz 与铅笔波束：定向多吉比特 DMG（11ad）与 EDMG（11ay）

blocks.en: Most of Wi-Fi crowds into the 2.4 and 5 (and now 6) GHz bands — narrow, busy lanes that everyone shares. DMG (Directional Multi-Gigabit, the 802.11ad PHY) takes the opposite bet: it walks away from the crowded low bands and moves up to the wide-open 60 GHz spectrum. Up there a single channel is 2.16 GHz wide — roughly the entire width of the old 2.4 GHz band, dedicated to one link. That enormous bandwidth is what buys multi-gigabit speed.
blocks.zh: 大多数 Wi-Fi 都挤在 2.4 GHz、5 GHz（现在还有 6 GHz）频段里——这些都是大家共用的、狭窄而拥挤的“车道”。DMG（定向多吉比特，即 802.11ad 的 PHY）做的是相反的赌注：它离开拥挤的低频段，转而搬到空旷的 60 GHz 频谱。在那里，单个信道就有 2.16 GHz 宽——几乎相当于整个老 2.4 GHz 频段的宽度，而且专供一条链路使用。正是这巨大的带宽，换来了多吉比特级的速度。

blocks.en: There is no free lunch. At 60 GHz the signal is fragile: it fades quickly with distance and is easily blocked by a wall, a door, or even a person standing in the way (oxygen in the air actually absorbs 60 GHz energy). A signal broadcast equally in all directions would die within a few meters. The escape hatch is to stop broadcasting everywhere. Instead of a floodlight, DMG uses an antenna array to concentrate all its energy into a narrow 'pencil beam' aimed straight at the partner — a focused beam carries much farther than a spread-out one. The whole PHY is built around steering that beam to the right place.
blocks.zh: 天下没有免费的午餐。在 60 GHz，信号非常脆弱：它随距离迅速衰减，很容易被一堵墙、一扇门，甚至一个挡在路上的人所阻断（空气中的氧气实际上会吸收 60 GHz 的能量）。如果向各个方向均匀广播，信号在几米之内就会消亡。出路就是不再向四面八方广播。DMG 不像泛光灯那样发散，而是用天线阵列把全部能量汇聚成一束狭窄的“铅笔波束”，直直地对准通信对端——一束聚焦的波束比发散的波束传得远得多。整个 PHY 都是围绕“把这束波束指向正确的方向”而构建的。

blocks.en: Think of it as the difference between a bare lightbulb and a laser pointer. The same power, spread over the whole room, barely lights a far wall; squeezed into a thin beam, it makes a bright dot across the building. 60 GHz Wi-Fi only works because it 'aims' rather than 'shouts'.
blocks.zh: 可以把它想象成裸露的灯泡和激光笔的区别。同样的功率撒满整个房间，几乎照不亮远处的墙；可一旦压缩成一束细光，就能在整栋楼里打出一个明亮的光点。60 GHz Wi-Fi 之所以能用，正是因为它“瞄准”而非“喊话”。

blocks.en: DMG defines a few PHY modes for different jobs. Control mode (MCS 0) is the slow, rugged setup mode — DBPSK at about 27.5 Mb/s, robust enough to be heard before the beam is even aligned, so it carries the messages that get a link off the ground. Once the beam is aligned, data flows in single-carrier (SC) mode: a family of MCSs climbing from pi/2-BPSK up through pi/2-QPSK, pi/2-16-QAM and pi/2-64-QAM, reaching multiple gigabits per second. (There is also an OFDM data mode for the harshest multipath.) Every PHY header carries a Training Length field — a hook that lets a data packet also double as beam-training traffic.
blocks.zh: DMG 为不同任务定义了几种 PHY 模式。控制模式（MCS 0）是缓慢而坚固的“建链”模式——采用 DBPSK，速率约 27.5 Mb/s，足够稳健，能在波束尚未对准之前就被对方听见，因此用来承载让链路起步的那些消息。一旦波束对准，数据就以单载波（SC）模式传输：一族 MCS 从 pi/2-BPSK 一路爬升，经过 pi/2-QPSK、pi/2-16-QAM、pi/2-64-QAM，达到每秒数吉比特。（针对最恶劣的多径环境，还另有一种 OFDM 数据模式。）每个 PHY 头都带有一个训练长度（Training Length）字段——这是一个“钩子”，让数据包同时也能充当波束训练用的流量。

blocks.en:
mindmap
  root((60 GHz PHY family))
    DMG 802.11ad
      Control mode MCS0
        DBPSK ~27.5 Mb/s
        robust setup
      SC mode
        pi/2-BPSK..64-QAM
        multi-Gb/s data
      OFDM mode
        harsh multipath
      Beamforming
        sector-level sweep SLS
        beam refinement BRP
    EDMG 802.11ay
      channel bonding/aggregation
      MIMO multiple streams
      Short SSW faster sweep
      EDMG beam refinement
blocks.zh:
mindmap
  root((60 GHz PHY 家族))
    DMG 802.11ad
      控制模式 MCS0
        DBPSK 约27.5 Mb/s
        稳健建链
      SC 单载波模式
        pi/2-BPSK..64-QAM
        多吉比特数据
      OFDM 模式
        恶劣多径
      波束成形
        扇区级扫描 SLS
        波束精化 BRP
    EDMG 802.11ay
      信道绑定/聚合
      MIMO 多数据流
      短SSW 更快扫描
      EDMG 波束精化

blocks.en: How do two devices find each other's beam directions in the first place? They sweep. In the sector-level sweep (SLS), a transmitter fires the same short control-mode frame once per candidate sector, slowly rotating its beam through every direction it can point. The partner listens (often quasi-omni at first) and notes which sweep frame arrived strongest — that tells it which transmit sector to ask for. Once a coarse direction is picked, beam refinement (BRP) fine-tunes it: special BRP packets append a TRN training field of repeated Golay sequences, and the transmitter nudges its antenna weight vector at the start of each TRN subfield while the receiver measures which tweak looks best. SLS gets you in the right neighborhood; BRP dials in the exact best transmit/receive beam pair.
blocks.zh: 那么两台设备最初是如何找到彼此的波束方向的呢？靠扫描。在扇区级扫描（SLS）中，发射方对每一个候选扇区各发一次相同的短控制模式帧，让波束缓缓地遍历它能指向的所有方向。对端在一旁聆听（最初通常用准全向方式），记下哪一帧来得最强——这就告诉它该请求对方用哪个发射扇区。一旦选定了粗略方向，波束精化（BRP）再来精细微调：专门的 BRP 数据包在尾部附加一段由重复 Golay 序列构成的 TRN 训练字段，发射方在每个 TRN 子字段开头微调自己的天线权重向量（AWV），接收方则测量哪一次微调效果最好。SLS 让你大致进入正确的“街区”，BRP 则把最佳的收发波束对精确锁定。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 360 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='40' cy='90' r='10' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><text x='40' y='120' font-size='11' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' text-anchor='middle'>TX</text><circle cx='320' cy='90' r='10' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/><text x='320' y='120' font-size='11' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' text-anchor='middle'>RX</text><line x1='50' y1='90' x2='150' y2='30' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><line x1='50' y1='90' x2='150' y2='60' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><line x1='50' y1='90' x2='150' y2='150' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/><polygon points='52,84 310,86 310,94 52,96' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' opacity='0.85'/><text x='180' y='80' font-size='11' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' text-anchor='middle'>best beam pair</text><text x='110' y='168' font-size='10' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' text-anchor='middle'>swept sectors (rejected)</text></svg>

caption.en: Sweeping candidate sectors (dashed) then locking the strongest transmit/receive beam pair (solid) into a narrow pencil beam.
caption.zh: 先扫描各候选扇区（虚线），再把最强的收发波束对（实线）锁定为一束狭窄的铅笔波束。

blocks.en: EDMG (Enhanced DMG, the 802.11ay PHY) keeps the same 60 GHz pencil-beam idea but scales it up hard. It bonds and aggregates the 2.16 GHz channels — using 2, 3, or 4 contiguous channels (up to 8.64 GHz wide), or aggregating non-adjacent ones — and adds MIMO so several spatial streams ride the same beams at once. Together these push EDMG into the tens of gigabits per second. The beam machinery scales too: EDMG keeps DMG's BRP refinement and adds richer TRN-Unit structures, plus a Short Sector Sweep (Short SSW) PPDU — a stripped-down 6-octet control-mode frame that makes the initial sector sweep faster and cheaper than sending full sweep frames.
blocks.zh: EDMG（增强型 DMG，即 802.11ay 的 PHY）保留了同样的 60 GHz 铅笔波束思路，但把它大幅放大。它对 2.16 GHz 信道进行绑定与聚合——使用 2、3 或 4 个连续信道（最宽达 8.64 GHz），或聚合不相邻的信道——并加入 MIMO，让多条空间流同时搭载在同一组波束上。两者合力，把 EDMG 推上每秒数十吉比特。波束机制也随之升级：EDMG 保留了 DMG 的 BRP 波束精化，并增加了更丰富的 TRN-Unit 结构，还引入了短扇区扫描（Short SSW）PPDU——一种精简的 6 字节控制模式帧，使最初的扇区扫描比发送完整扫描帧更快、更省。

blocks.en: The pattern to remember: DMG/EDMG win bandwidth by going to 60 GHz, lose range and wall-penetration as the price, and buy the range back with beamforming. Every PHY piece — robust control mode, the SLS sweep, BRP refinement, EDMG's Short SSW — exists to find and maintain that one good beam direction quickly.
blocks.zh: 要记住的规律是：DMG/EDMG 通过搬到 60 GHz 赢得了带宽，代价是损失了距离和穿墙能力，再用波束成形把距离“买回来”。每一个 PHY 部件——稳健的控制模式、SLS 扫描、BRP 精化、EDMG 的 Short SSW——存在的意义都在于：快速找到并维持那唯一一个好的波束方向。

summary.en: Control mode, SC MCS table, and how BRP packets actually train the beam
summary.zh: 控制模式、SC MCS 表，以及 BRP 数据包究竟如何训练波束

blocks.en: In the standard, DMG control mode (20.4) is mandatory, sent at MCS 0 with DBPSK and an effective LDPC code rate of at most 1/2, listed at 27.5 Mb/s; its preamble (a long Short Training field of repeated Gb128 sequences plus a Channel Estimation field) is built to be detected before any beam is aligned. DMG SC mode (20.5) carries the data rates: Table 20-15 runs MCS 1-12 (plus extended 9.1, 12.1-12.6) from pi/2-BPSK through pi/2-QPSK, pi/2-16-QAM and pi/2-64-QAM, reaching about 8085 Mb/s, with support for MCS 4 and below mandatory. Beamforming (20.9.1) trains a pair of STAs' transmit and receive antennas; DMG STAs use a quasi-omni pattern as the wide fallback. The sector-level sweep (20.9.2.1) sends sweep frames as control-mode (or SC-mode) PPDUs; beam refinement (20.9.2.2) uses BRP-RX and BRP-TX PPDUs that append an AGC field and a TRN field built from Golay sequences (Ga/Gb128) — in a BRP-TX PPDU the transmitter may change its AWV at the start of each TRN subfield so the receiver can measure each candidate. EDMG (28.9) reuses this: 28.9.1 defines the 6-octet Short SSW PPDU (itself a control-mode PPDU with Length=6) to speed the sweep, and 28.9.2 says an EDMG STA shall support the 20.9.2 refinement plus EDMG BRP-RX/TX PPDUs whose TRN field can span the bonded 2.16 GHz channels (2, 3, or 4 of them for a 4.32/6.48/8.64 GHz channel).
blocks.zh: 在标准中，DMG 控制模式（20.4）是强制的，以 MCS 0 发送，采用 DBPSK，有效 LDPC 码率不超过 1/2，标称速率 27.5 Mb/s；它的前导码（由重复 Gb128 序列构成的长短训练字段，加上信道估计字段）专门设计成在任何波束对准之前就能被检测到。DMG SC 模式（20.5）承载数据速率：表 20-15 列出 MCS 1–12（外加扩展的 9.1、12.1–12.6），从 pi/2-BPSK 经 pi/2-QPSK、pi/2-16-QAM 到 pi/2-64-QAM，最高约 8085 Mb/s，其中 MCS 4 及以下的支持是强制的。波束成形（20.9.1）让一对 STA 训练各自的收发天线；DMG STA 以准全向方向图作为宽覆盖的回退。扇区级扫描（20.9.2.1）以控制模式（或 SC 模式）PPDU 发送扫描帧；波束精化（20.9.2.2）使用 BRP-RX 和 BRP-TX PPDU，在尾部附加 AGC 字段和由 Golay 序列（Ga/Gb128）构成的 TRN 字段——在 BRP-TX PPDU 中，发射方可在每个 TRN 子字段开头改变其 AWV，以便接收方逐一测量各候选波束。EDMG（28.9）复用了这一切：28.9.1 定义了 6 字节的 Short SSW PPDU（其本身是 Length=6 的控制模式 PPDU）来加快扫描，28.9.2 规定 EDMG STA 应支持 20.9.2 的精化流程，外加 EDMG BRP-RX/TX PPDU，其 TRN 字段可横跨绑定的 2.16 GHz 信道（4.32/6.48/8.64 GHz 信道分别对应 2、3 或 4 个）。

cites.note: 20.4 DMG control mode — mandatory MCS 0, DBPSK, ~27.5 Mb/s, robust setup preamble (STF + CEF)
20.5 DMG SC mode — Table 20-15 MCS 1-12 (and extended) pi/2-BPSK..pi/2-64-QAM, multi-Gb/s data rates
20.9.1 Beamforming concept — train TX/RX antennas of a STA pair; quasi-omni fallback pattern
20.9.2 Beamforming PPDU format — sector-level sweep (control/SC PPDUs); beam refinement BRP-RX/BRP-TX, AGC + TRN field of Golay sequences, per-subfield AWV change
28.9.1 EDMG Short SSW PPDU — 6-octet control-mode PPDU (Length=6) speeding the sector sweep
28.9.2 EDMG beam refinement — supports 20.9.2 plus EDMG BRP-RX/TX PPDUs; TRN field spans bonded 2.16 GHz channels
